use_cases: Dynamic hero background for SaaS landing pages
Interactive visual centerpiece for tech product websites
Animated section background that responds to user mouse movement
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered SaaS hero section featuring an animated plasma shader effect with customizable colors, speed, and mouse interactivity. Built with OGL renderer, this component creates fluid, colorful plasma animations that respond to cursor movement, ideal for modern SaaS landing pages and tech product showcases.
